173.reason: [When encountering a single '|', the lexer correctly reports error 'a', but it does not skip the character. The loop will process the same '|' again in the next iteration because 'i' is not advanced, potentially causing an infinite loop or duplicate error reporting. Similarly for single '&'.]

The loop will process the same '|' again in the next iteration because 'i' is not advanced, potentially causing an infinite loop or duplicate error reporting. Similarly for single '&'.]
